title: Brazilian Pasta Salad
description: A delicious and easy-to-make pasta salad with a twist of Brazilian flavors. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Brazilian
ingredients.notes: available in most grocery stores as a spice blend

instructions: Cook the vermicelli according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked vermicelli, crunchy, and Brazilian spice blend.
Mix well and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
